nasb.text: Next to him shall be the tribe of Manasseh, and the leader of the sons of Manasseh: Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur,

esv.text: And next to him shall be the tribe of Manasseh, the chief of the people of Manasseh being Gamaliel the son of Pedahzur,

cnv.text: 在他旁邊的，是瑪拿西支派，瑪拿西人的領袖是比大蓿的兒子迦瑪列。

ccb.text: 以法莲支派旁边是玛拿西支派，首领是比大苏的儿子迦玛列，
